candidate_definition_hints.text: Toolkit for training/converting LibreTranslate compatible language models 🚂

Easy to use, cross-platform toolkit to train [argos-translate](https://github.com/argosopentech/argos-translate) models, which can be used by [LibreTranslate](https://github.com/LibreTranslate/LibreTranslate) 🚂

candidate_glosses.text: Easy to use, cross-platform toolkit to train [argos-translate](https://github.com/argosopentech/argos-translate) models, which can be used by [LibreTranslate](https://github.com/LibreTranslate/LibreTranslate) 🚂
